title: Light Fruit Cocktail of Love
overview: Kouji encounters a beautiful girl and decides to apply for a part-time position at the family restaurant where she works.

title: Love Labyrinth Parfait
overview: Kouji moves into his new pad and encounters some unusual individuals.

title: Masquerade Sundae of Love
overview: While running errands, Kouji stumbles upon a strange photoshoot.

title: Milk Shake of Love
overview: Workplace conflict begins to make life hard for Kouji.

title: X'Mas-A-La-Mode of Love
overview: Kouji formulates a plan for Christmas as the holiday fast approaches.

title: Last Order is...Which One!?
overview: The stakes have never been higher for Kouji with romance on the line.
